required_operator_inputs: start from codex/parameter-functionality-campaign after the Collatz feature branch is integrated
prove Phoenix p runtime authority before adding or changing controls
repair only missing Phoenix p control-surface or proof gaps
use no-mouse persistent runtime proof and avoid repeated viewer relaunch loops
forbidden_operator_prompts: add a new Phoenix math model or FractalType in this slice
add Phoenix owner controls to explaino_all
change Color Pipeline, capture finding, FPS pacing, equation-pack viewport integration, perturbation zoom, or generated editors
use OS mouse automation or physical cursor tests

required_defaults.owner_lane: phoenix and existing Phoenix-step carrier lanes only

required_validation_commands: py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label pfc_phoenix_schema --log artifacts/logs/pfc_phoenix_schema.log --out-json artifacts/validation/pfc_phoenix_schema.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- ui_app/build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd advanced_color_grading_owner

py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label pfc_phoenix_safe_mode --log artifacts/logs/pfc_phoenix_safe_mode.log --out-json artifacts/validation/pfc_phoenix_safe_mode.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- ui_app/build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd test_safe_mode_schema

py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label pfc_phoenix_sample --log artifacts/logs/pfc_phoenix_sample.log --out-json artifacts/validation/pfc_phoenix_sample.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- ui_app/build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd test_fractal_sample_kernel

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The Phoenix parameterization contract validates successfully
The Phoenix parameterization hostile audit is complete
